gradient_budget_mlp.note: 8 envs × 4096 n_steps = 32768 samples/rollout; 32768/4096 = 8 minibatches × 5 epochs = 40 grad steps/rollout; at 10M steps → ~305 rollouts → ~12K total grad steps (legged_gym convention: moderate per-rollout updates)

gradient_budget_hierarchical.note: 8 envs × 2048 n_steps = 16384 samples/rollout; 16384/256 = 64 minibatches × 5 epochs = 320 grad steps/rollout; at 15M steps → ~916 rollouts → ~293K total grad steps

training_methods.standard: src/training/train.py — MLP PPO [2048,1024,512], default 10M steps, batch=4096, n_epochs=5
training_methods.hierarchical: src/training/train_hierarchical.py — BC(100 epochs) + Transformer+MoE PPO(15M, n_epochs=5)

pd_controller.reference: Go1 specs: 23.7 Nm hip/thigh, 35.55 Nm knee

reward_scales_v4.1.note: See REWARD_SCALES in src/env/cheetah_env.py for authoritative values
key_changes_from_v4: All penalty scales uniformly divided by 3
v4 had penalties=-7.5/step vs positives=+2.1/step with random policy → 98% clamped to 0
v4.1 has penalties=-2.6/step vs positives=+3.2/step → 43% positive, mean r_total=+0.63
PPO hyperparams: n_epochs=5, batch_size=4096 (carried from v4)
